name: MCP Chinese Getting Started Guide
what_it_does: A comprehensive Chinese-language tutorial and educational guide for the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Covers MCP server development with Python/FastMCP, client implementation, tool integration, sampling callbacks, LLM integration (DeepSeek), and Claude Desktop configuration. This is NOT an MCP server -- it is documentation only.
use_cases: Learning MCP concepts and architecture in Chinese
Building your first MCP server with Python and FastMCP
Integrating MCP servers with Claude Desktop or DeepSeek
not_for: Direct use as an MCP server or tool
English-speaking developers (content is in Simplified Chinese)
best_when: You are a Chinese-speaking developer learning MCP from scratch and want step-by-step tutorials with Python code examples.
avoid_when: You need an actual MCP server to deploy, or you don't read Simplified Chinese.

auth.notes: Not applicable -- this is a documentation repository.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Not applicable -- this is a tutorial/guide, not a server.
known_agent_gotchas: This is NOT an MCP server -- it is a documentation/tutorial repository
All content is in Simplified Chinese only
Code examples are for learning, not production use

security_score_components.security_notes: Community/specialized tool. Apply standard security practices for category. Review documentation for specific security requirements.
